summary: Warm, crisp audience tape captures a solid, mellow show highlighted by a spectacular Space → The Other One jam and an energizing One More Saturday Night finish.
review: The performance is consistently strong with beautiful, introspective Garcia work and a standout Space into The Other One sequence, while the final three Bobby‑rock songs lift the set’s energy. Recording-wise the audience tape is warm, clean and surprisingly close to the board, offering excellent fidelity and definition. Some listeners note a lack of dramatic peaks and a slightly spaced‑out feel from Jerry, but overall the show is regarded as solid and enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Four detailed reviews praise the recording’s excellent fidelity and note strong musical moments (Space→The Other One, OMSN), while also mentioning a mellow vibe and occasional lack of peak intensity; weighted average yields an overall 4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Warm, clean audience tape with great definition; described as positioned just in front of the board, crisp and well‑produced, offering excellent fidelity compared to other soundboard releases.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert stays mellow and solid through most of the set, building to a sublime Space→The Other One jam, then lifts with three upbeat Bobby‑rock songs at the end, delivering an overall satisfying arc.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is described as beautiful yet spaced‑out and introspective; his playing fuels the standout jams but may lack dramatic peaks on this night.
